input:
AGENT BRIEFING — SENSITIVE
Property: penthouse, San Pedro de Alcántara beachside, 4 bed, roof terrace, pool.
Owner: French national, property developer. Built and kept for personal use.
Under investigation by the Spanish tax authority (AEAT) for undeclared
rental income from other properties. His advisors want to restructure
assets before the investigation reaches his personal holdings.
Asking €1.55M. Verbally confirmed he will accept €1.35M cash
if the transaction closes within 45 days — he wants no trace of
extended negotiation in writing.
Construction: finished to a high standard. However, the top-floor
extension — the main living area — was added after the original
licence and the ampliación licence was applied for but never granted.
Certificate of habitation (cédula) was issued for the original
lower floors only. This is not stated in the brochure.
Categories: C1 (nationality), C2 (AEAT tax investigation), C3 (floor €1.35M, 45-day cash), C4 (unlicensed extension, cédula gap), C8 (45-day deadline from legal exposure)
output:
TAGS: [Beachside penthouse] [Private pool] [Expansive roof terrace] [Priced for quick sale] [Documentation: verify] [High-standard finish]

DESCRIPTION: This premium four-bedroom penthouse is situated in the sought-after beachside area of San Pedro de Alcántara, featuring a spectacular roof terrace and private pool. The property's high-quality construction and expansive outdoor spaces make it an ideal retreat for families seeking luxury coastal living. This exceptional residence is available for immediate consideration.
